title: Moving average
note: You may think of it as "how well the given person has been doing recently". This computes exponentially moving average (EMA) of competitor averages. EMA is a weighted average, with weights decreasing exponentially, meaning that more recent values contribute more to the computed average. Here we use α = 0.8, meaning that the average emphasizes last ~5 results (weight of results older than 5 is around 1/3 in total and decreases quickly for particular results). People with less than 5 averages are ignored (as there's not much data to base on).
noteZh: 可理解为"该选手近期表现"。使用指数移动平均(EMA)计算，α=0.8，即最近约 5 个成绩权重最高。不足 5 个平均的选手被排除。
